title: UK Unveils Digital Toolkit to Boost African Market Access - FinancialEDGE
description: The UK and PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), through the UK-Kenya Tech Hub, today launched a digital toolkit aimed at helping entrepreneurs access markets in the Kenyan, Nigerian, and South African markets. The toolkit was developed following a study that was aimed at understanding the practical requirements for startups to enter the three markets. Key areas of focus
html: The UK and PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC), through the UK-Kenya Tech Hub, today launched a digital toolkit aimed at helping entrepreneurs access markets in the Kenyan, Nigerian, and South African markets.
